title: perf backfill c8g + 5.45–5.65 gap (was jssm#874)
manager: Backfill the historical performance trend on the c8g graviton runner across the 5.45–5.65 version gap, so the perf chart has no blind spot where a regression could have hidden. A trend line with a hole in it can't defend against a slowdown that landed in the gap; filling it makes the whole perf history trustworthy.
cs: c8g graviton runner; local timings are untrusted, only graviton numbers gate decisions
